data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement of rewarding regular customers.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement to 'Reward regular customers', but there is no concrete evidence provided that confirms this feature is implemented or functioning as required. The linked use case mentions the need to reward regular customers, yet the prior steps do not provide any evidence of this feature being tested or validated. Therefore, the assessment remains inconclusive as the necessary evidence is lacking.
gaps: No evidence of mechanisms in place to reward regular customers.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the requirement of rewarding regular customers.
